bsdconfig

Hi! 
  I am using Intel 8270AC wireless on xiaomi notebook 12.5 with Intel 6y30 CPU. And I can only write my wifi information in file /etc/wpa_supplicant.conf. I cannot change wifi by command "bsdconfig". I click any wifi ssid will get no reply because of that I cannot input anything such my password. Please look at the photo.
